global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with minimalistic illustrations and bold text promoting a food delivery service.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: two glasses
elements.description: Two stylized glasses are depicted in a minimalistic line art style, positioned centrally in the ad.

elements.label: two glasses
elements.description: Another view of the two glasses, maintaining the same minimalistic line art style, slightly overlapping with the first.

elements.label: two glasses
elements.description: A third representation of the two glasses, continuing the minimalistic theme and enhancing the central focus.

elements.label: promotional text
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Fast food, fast' is prominently displayed, with a smaller line below it indicating 'Free delivery over $15'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a clean, modern font at the top left corner, colored in black.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom center reads 'Get offer' in bold white text against a contrasting background.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a bold, eye-catching font at the bottom left, colored in black.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, drawing attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, promotional text, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main subject is centered, the body text is below the subject, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Free delivery over $15, SnapMeal, Get offer, €9.99, SALE
